description: Call to Arms Patch 9 (28 July 2021) — General Corrupted Dungeon Changes, New Corrupted Dungeon Mob: Corrupted Mephit, Overcrowded Zone Skipping Changes, Marketplace Notification Improvements, Faction Warfare Changes, New Ability Icons Added, Other Changes, Combat Balance Changes, Fixes.

sections.heading: General Corrupted Dungeon Changes

items.text: The Shrine at the dungeon start (registering for PvP) must now be activated within 45 seconds of entering the dungeon
All Cooldowns (including capes) are now reset at the start of an invasion
All Healing Cast inside the Corrupted Dungeon is now reduced more (10% → 20%)
Spike Traps: Hit area improved to fit the visuals more closely to better communicate their damage area
Demented Heretic Thief: Now consistently tries to slow the target at the start of combat
Slag Spewer: Now casts more frequently (Cooldown 5s → 3s), and the Magma Ball moves faster but has reduced damage (900 → 750) and knockback (5m → 2.5m)

stats.name: Slag Spewer
stats.to: 3s), and the Magma Ball moves faster but has reduced damage and knockback

items.text: Incendiary Fissure and Magma Mephit: The damage effect can no longer be cleansed while inside the lava

sections.searchable_text: General Corrupted Dungeon Changes The Shrine at the dungeon start (registering for PvP) must now be activated within 45 seconds of entering the dungeon All Cooldowns (including capes) are now reset at the start of an invasion All Healing Cast inside the Corrupted Dungeon is now reduced more (10% → 20%) Spike Traps: Hit area improved to fit the visuals more closely to better communicate their damage area Demented Heretic Thief: Now consistently tries to slow the target at the start of combat Slag Spewer: Now casts more frequently (Cooldown 5s → 3s), and the Magma Ball moves faster but has reduced damage (900 → 750) and knockback (5m → 2.5m) Incendiary Fissure and Magma Mephit: The damage effect can no longer be cleansed while inside the lava

sections.heading: New Corrupted Dungeon Mob: Corrupted Mephit

subsections.heading: not

items.text: During an invasion, a new mob, the Corrupted Mephit, now spawns in every corridor and applies a stacking debuff to the first player passing it
Mob Spawn Conditions

subitems.text: 180 seconds have passed since the invasion began on Slayer difficulty or 300 seconds on other difficulties, AND
one player has damaged another player

items.text: Mob Behavior

subitems.text: When a player enters the mob's aggro range, the mob attacks and applies one stack of the "Corruption" debuff, killing itself in the process
The mob can see invisible players
The buff is always applied, even when invincible
Mobs that respawn can immediately aggro the closest player
If both players go 45 seconds without damaging each other, all these mobs temporarily despawn
As soon as one player damages another again, the mob respawn cycle restarts

items.text: Corruption Debuff

subitems.text: Reduces Max Health by 1% per stack
Additionally slows by 1% per stack beginning with the 6th stack

subsections.searchable_text: not During an invasion, a new mob, the Corrupted Mephit, now spawns in every corridor and applies a stacking debuff to the first player passing it Mob Spawn Conditions 180 seconds have passed since the invasion began on Slayer difficulty or 300 seconds on other difficulties, AND one player has damaged another player Mob Behavior Appears in every corridor When a player enters the mob's aggro range, the mob attacks and applies one stack of the "Corruption" debuff, killing itself in the process The mob can see invisible players The buff is always applied, even when invincible After 30 seconds, the mob respawns Mobs that respawn can immediately aggro the closest player If both players go 45 seconds without damaging each other, all these mobs temporarily despawn As soon as one player damages another again, the mob respawn cycle restarts Corruption Debuff Reduces Max Health by 1% per stack Additionally slows by 1% per stack beginning with the 6th stack Max Stacks: 25 Duration: the entire Invasion

sections.searchable_text: New Corrupted Dungeon Mob: Corrupted Mephit still allow for a few disengages adding a penalty not During an invasion, a new mob, the Corrupted Mephit, now spawns in every corridor and applies a stacking debuff to the first player passing it Mob Spawn Conditions Mob Behavior Corruption Debuff

sections.heading: Overcrowded Zone Skipping Changes

items.text: Zones must still be overcrowded for a minimum duration before they can be skipped, which resets regularly
However, if the zone becomes uncrowded for a brief time it no longer resets the counter
Also reduced personal cooldown for zone skipping: 125s → 60s

stats.name: Also reduced personal cooldown for zone skipping

items.text: Overall, this should reduce wait times for zone skipping

sections.searchable_text: Overcrowded Zone Skipping Changes Zones must still be overcrowded for a minimum duration before they can be skipped, which resets regularly However, if the zone becomes uncrowded for a brief time it no longer resets the counter Also reduced personal cooldown for zone skipping: 125s → 60s Overall, this should reduce wait times for zone skipping

sections.heading: Marketplace Notification Improvements

items.text: In addition to summary mails (introduced with the last patch) sent when Marketplace orders are completely fulfilled or expire, a mail is now also sent to players who cancel their own Buy / Sell Orders, so players still get the overview for partly fulfilled orders they have canceled
Additional info has been added to Marketplace mails to clarify that they are summaries of full orders, and that some items / Silver may have already been received

sections.searchable_text: Marketplace Notification Improvements In addition to summary mails (introduced with the last patch) sent when Marketplace orders are completely fulfilled or expire, a mail is now also sent to players who cancel their own Buy / Sell Orders, so players still get the overview for partly fulfilled orders they have canceled Additional info has been added to Marketplace mails to clarify that they are summaries of full orders, and that some items / Silver may have already been received

sections.heading: Faction Warfare Changes

subsections.heading: Bandit Ringleader

items.text: The boss now spawns a wave of support mobs four times per fight, once for every 20% reduction in his health

The number of spawned mobs is now more precisely based on the number of attackers, and maxes out at 6 spawned mobs when attacked by 15 or more players (where "attacking" means being on the boss's aggro list)

subsections.searchable_text: Bandit Ringleader The boss now spawns a wave of support mobs four times per fight, once for every 20% reduction in his health The number of spawned mobs is now more precisely based on the number of attackers, and maxes out at 6 spawned mobs when attacked by 15 or more players (where "attacking" means being on the boss's aggro list) 1-4 attackers: 1 mob 5-7 attackers: 2 mobs 8-9 attackers: 3 mobs 10-12 attackers: 4 mobs 13-14 attackers: 5 mobs 15+ attackers: 6 mobs

sections.heading: New Ability Icons Added

items.text: Blood Bandit (One-Handed Axe, E-slot)
Protective Beam (Enigmatic Staff, E-slot)
Arcane Orb (One-Handed Arcane Staff, E-slot)
Ground Shaker (Maces, W-slot)

sections.searchable_text: New Ability Icons Added Blood Bandit (One-Handed Axe, E-slot) Protective Beam (Enigmatic Staff, E-slot) Arcane Orb (One-Handed Arcane Staff, E-slot) Ground Shaker (Maces, W-slot)

sections.heading: Other Changes

items.text: Reduced recovery time of items from destroyed Hideouts from 28 days to 7 days, and halved the recovery fee
Guild Season Winner popup is now only shown for up to 3 days after the season ends, and only to characters who have unlocked Expert Adventurer
[MOBILE] Scaling optimizations to Character Creation, Item Details, Farming, and Laborer UIs

sections.heading: Combat Balance Changes

subsections.heading: Axes

items.text: Rending Rage (all Axes)

subitems.text: Cooldown between hits: 1s → 0s (Now only limited by Global Cooldown)

items.text: Adrenaline Boost (all Axes)

subitems.text: Time window for direct damage condition: 2.5s → 3.5s

stats.name: Time window for direct damage condition

items.text: Battle Rush (all Axes)

subitems.text: Doesn't require a target anymore. It is instead a ground target dash with the AoE Effect.

items.text: Bloody Reap (Infernal Scythe)

subitems.text: Removed the Damage over Time effect
Second Hit does now extra damage if enemy health is below 40%

subsections.searchable_text: Axes Rending Rage (all Axes) 1st and 2nd Hit Standtime: 0.3s → 0.16s Cooldown between hits: 1s → 0s (Now only limited by Global Cooldown) Adrenaline Boost (all Axes) Time window for direct damage condition: 2.5s → 3.5s Battle Rush (all Axes) Doesn't require a target anymore. It is instead a ground target dash with the AoE Effect. Bloody Reap (Infernal Scythe) First Hit Damage: 74.45 → 108 Removed the Damage over Time effect Second Hit does now extra damage if enemy health is below 40%

subsections.heading: Daggers

items.text: Deadly Swipe (all Daggers)

subitems.text: Energy is now also regained when hitting mobs (no longer limited to enemy players)

items.text: Forbidden Stab (all Daggers)

subitems.text: Removed the Healing Received and Healing Cast Debuff
Instead, the target won't be able to receive any healing for 1.5s (this debuff is cleanseable)
The ability now also interrupts enemy spell casting

items.text: Chain Slash (all Daggers)

subitems.text: Damage now increases with each consecutive hit

subsections.searchable_text: Daggers Deadly Swipe (all Daggers) Energy Cost: 6 → 7 Energy Regain on hit: 2 → 4 Energy is now also regained when hitting mobs (no longer limited to enemy players) Forbidden Stab (all Daggers) Hit Delay: 0.1s → 0s Standtime: 0.2s → 0.1s Removed the Healing Received and Healing Cast Debuff Instead, the target won't be able to receive any healing for 1.5s (this debuff is cleanseable) The ability now also interrupts enemy spell casting Chain Slash (all Daggers) Damage now increases with each consecutive hit

subsections.heading: Furious Flame

items.text: Added a new Q-slot Ability, Searing Flame

subitems.text: Fire a Searing Flame in the target direction. The first enemy hit receives 94 magical damage and starts burning. Each time you hit an enemy with Searing Flame you get a charge. If you have 3 Searing Flame Charges, your next Searing Flame cast will be a Furious Flame instead, dealing 182 magical damage on impact. Burning enemies take 11 magical damage every second for 4 seconds.

subsections.searchable_text: Furious Flame Added a new Q-slot Ability, Searing Flame Fire a Searing Flame in the target direction. The first enemy hit receives 94 magical damage and starts burning. Each time you hit an enemy with Searing Flame you get a charge. If you have 3 Searing Flame Charges, your next Searing Flame cast will be a Furious Flame instead, dealing 182 magical damage on impact. Burning enemies take 11 magical damage every second for 4 seconds.

subsections.heading: Frost Staffs

items.text: Ice Storm (Glacial Staff)

subitems.text: The cast direction can now be chosen after the cast position

subsections.searchable_text: Frost Staffs Ice Storm (Glacial Staff) The cast direction can now be chosen after the cast position Cast range: 5m → 10m Ice Storm travel distance: 23m → 18m Damage per Tick (vs players): 60 → 72 Damage per Tick (vs mobs): 20 → 25

subsections.heading: Maces

items.text: Blessed Aurora (Oathkeepers)

subsections.searchable_text: Maces Blessed Aurora (Oathkeepers) Max affected Allies: 10 → 20

subsections.heading: Nature Staffs

items.text: Spirit Animal (Rampant Staff)

subsections.searchable_text: Nature Staffs Spirit Animal (Rampant Staff) Cooldown: 45s → 30s

subsections.heading: Crescent Slash

items.text: Heroic Charge (all Swords)
Interrupt (all Swords)
Hamstring (all Swords)

subitems.text: If you have a Heroic Charge when casting, you can now cast a followup attack within 3 seconds
The followup consumes 1 Heroic Charge and is a ground-targeted 7m leap, inflicting another Hamstring on enemies in a 3m radius
Slow Strength: 38% → 25% (but the slow now stacks up to 2 times)

items.text: Spinning Blades (Dual Swords)

subitems.text: Jump End Position now offset by 3 meters. (This means the max range covers less distance for the caster, but also makes it easier to hit enemies without getting too close, making the cast harder to interrupt in midair.)

items.text: Mighty Swing (Clarent Blade)

subitems.text: Reworked the ability; it is now called Crescent Slash

Slice the air to shoot a demonic wave in the targeted direction, piercing through all enemies and dealing magical damage. Consumes all Heroic Charges for a secondary effect. (You can only get one of the effects depending on the amount of Heroic Charges, not multiple.)
Effects: Slows by 20% for 2s / Silences for 0.8s / Deals additional damage

items.text: Majestic Smash (Kingmaker)

subitems.text: Widened the hitbox of the Smash to make the followup hit more reliable

subsections.heading: Energy Source

items.text: Energy Drain (Royal Armor)

subitems.text: Reworked the ability, it is now called Energy Source and no longer reduces enemy energy

subsections.heading: Helmets

items.text: Circle of Inspiration (Druid Cowl)

subitems.text: Tick Interval: every 1s → every 0.5s (Energy gain per tick stays the same, so total energy output is doubled)

sections.heading: Fixes

items.text: Corrected an issue where players leaving Roads of Avalon could spawn at a Hideout if portal and Hideout were sufficiently close
Fixed an issue where Hideouts could be placed too close to zone exits
Fixed an issue where Sell Order Completed mails for Luxury Goods showed incorrect total price
Fixed an issue where chain spells could hit invisible targets
Fixed issues with Loadout and Guild UIs blocking other windows
Fixed an issue where incorrect guild member could be kicked from guild while member list was updating
Chat command /wiki now searches for unknown pages instead of immediately giving "page not found" error
Corrected buff description for T8 common fish (River Sturgeon / Steelscale Swordfish)
Fixed an issue where damage buff of Mortal Agony (Stalker Hood) could be cleansed by self or allies
Silence debuff of Flee (Miner Workboots) can no longer be removed by unequipping item
[MOBILE] Fixed an issue where the world map camera was zoomed out beyond maximum when first opened
Additional graphical, audio, animation, terrain, UI, and localization fixes
